creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Also, when the server is close to entering the thrashing state, we have turned off every jail and service (except for a few critical ones, ie SSHd) to see how much memory is being “lost”, and it was about 39GB~, with 9GB used by ARC.
> Mem: 63M Active, 8656M Inact, 18G Laundry, 17G Wired, 50G Free

Is the total amount of memory among these different states staying the same?  It looks like it, but I'm not sure.

It would be useful to see the output of vmstat -o when the system is close to trashing.
